message:
✨ Add KeepAlive route caching for faster dashboard navigation (#1179)

Replace per-route Layout wrapping with nested route structure and
KeepAliveOutlet that preserves component instances across navigations.
Previously visited dashboards are kept alive in the DOM (display: none)
and instantly revealed on re-visit — no unmount/remount, no re-fetch.

- KeepAliveOutlet: LRU cache (8 routes), resize dispatch on activation
- App.tsx: Nested routes under single Layout (removes ~360 lines)
- Layout.tsx: Falls through to KeepAliveOutlet when no explicit children
- Back-navigation: 18% faster (1285ms → 1054ms avg)
- All compliance tests pass (cache, loading, security, i18n)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

+          <Route path="/__compliance/all-cards" element={<CompliancePerfTest />} />
